name: What's the time limit to claim after ladder fall at my job in Boise?

mainEntity.name: What's the time limit to claim after ladder fall at my job in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Idaho: 60 days to file workers' comp after ladder fall.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**In Idaho, file workers' comp within 60 days of injury**; one year for hearing.[2]

Statutes are strict—late claims often denied unless good cause shown.[2] Personal injury suits have 2 years.

- Mark injury date exactly.
- Report same day if possible.
- No deadline for medical care once approved.

Act fast; evidence fades. Consult attorney early.

description: Idaho: 60 days to file workers' comp after ladder fall.
